population_and_sampling: 47 septic-shock patients; paired pretreatment and 24-hour whole-blood/PAXgene microarray samples; placebo and hydrocortisone arms
public_data_status: Public normalized series matrix and GPL10295 annotation are downloadable without controlled access
signature_coverage: All 74 component genes recoverable after the locked historical-symbol map; eight source-locked formulas calculable
analysis_role: Standalone T24 directional replication only; not added to the frozen six-cohort primary meta-analysis
reason: Meets the source-defined baseline, T24 pairing, case-population, public-access and complete-coverage requirements. Its randomized treatment context differs from the frozen observational synthesis, so overall and arm-stratified estimates are reported as post-freeze directional replication; arm-specific summaries are descriptive, no between-arm interaction was tested, and all strata share the full-cohort baseline standard deviation.

population_and_sampling: Five children with septic shock sampled at 0, 4, 8, 12, 24 and 48 hours
public_data_status: The current public record supplies IDF and SDRF metadata only; no raw or processed expression matrix is downloadable
signature_coverage: Not assessable from the public files
reason: Repeated sampling is relevant, but the expression values needed to implement the eight formulas and verify the 74-gene coverage are not publicly recoverable. Metadata alone cannot support a reproducible directional-replication analysis.

population_and_sampling: Eleven adults with sepsis sampled on days 1, 3 and 7; ten complete day-1/day-3 pairs reported
public_data_status: Raw sequencing files are public; processed gene-level values and analysis scripts are available only on request according to the article
signature_coverage: Not verifiable on the source-normalized analysis scale without a new raw-read pipeline
reason: A day-1 to day-3 contrast can approximate T48, but inclusion would require de novo alignment, quantification and normalization outside the frozen platform workflow. The public record does not provide a reviewer-reproducible processed matrix on which the eight formulas can be applied without introducing a new analysis pipeline.

population_and_sampling: Longitudinal Ghana sepsis cohort with whole-blood sampling at 0, 6, 24, 48 and 72 hours
public_data_status: Subject-level bulk RNA-seq data are controlled-access in dbGaP; the associated Zenodo files contain figure source data, differential-expression summaries, classifiers and single-cell data but not the subject-by-gene bulk expression matrix
signature_coverage: Not verifiable from openly accessible files
reason: The sampling schedule is eligible, but the patient-level bulk expression matrix required for the eight fixed formulas is not publicly available without dbGaP authorization. The open Zenodo source-data files are insufficient to reconstruct patient-level T24/T48 scores and paired effects.
